query: SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND (COLUMN_NAME = 'lojaId' OR COLUMN_NAME = 'gestorId' OR COLUMN_NAME = 'userId') AND TABLE_NAME > 'localidades_agendamento' ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rEtBRZHWZUfGJS.3b07a01772f8 --database 3c9MozLH35e233uWy5WDtH --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND (COLUMN_NAME = 'lojaId' OR COLUMN_NAME = 'gestorId' OR COLUMN_NAME = 'userId') AND TABLE_NAME > 'localidades_agendamento' ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
